title: Updated-date cache scaling
description: Scale the derived-`updated` cache loader so cold rebuild stays imperceptible at 3K+ issues / 10K+ tracker-touching commits. Five ranked optimizations: async background rebuild, pre-warm at server start, incremental refresh, disk persistence, watcher debounce. Frontend relative-time rendering lived briefly here too but moved to subtask 11 of the mental-model-alignment issue.
author: sidhantha
